title: carex neurocarpa
intro: Carex neurocarpa, also known as the 'narrow-leaved sedge', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The medicinal properties of Carex neurocarpa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Carex neurocarpa include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
